message:
fix(cli): add Zod runtime validation for credentials loading

Previously, loadCredentials() used type assertion without proper
runtime validation, only checking access_token and email fields.
Malformed credentials files could cause runtime errors.

Changes:
- Add CredentialsSchema using Zod for complete field validation
- Validate access_token, email, expires_at, tier, user_id
- Email must be valid format, tier must be "free" or "premium"
- Add 9 new tests for validation edge cases
- Add zod dependency to CLI package

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-x0li

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
